'''Epoh Bahb''' was a famed [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Musician/Legends|musician]] who performed with [[Jasod Revoc]] [[Jasod Revoc and his Galactic Revue|and his Galactic Revue]] throughout the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] at the end of the [[Great Peace of the Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Bith/Legends|Bith]], Epoh Bahb was a [[Musician/Legends|musician]] and a good friend of [[Epoh Trebor]]. By the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Bahb and Trebor had partnered with up-and-coming holo-actor [[Jasod Revoc]] to participate in a tour produced by [[HoloNet Entertainment]] under the banner of [[Jasod Revoc and his Galactic Revue]]. As they toured [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the performers would hold concerts for the troops of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Each performance began and ended with Bahb's most popular piece, the "[[Appreciated Reminiscences]]."<ref name="Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away">{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-an-overview-of-popular-music-and-musicians-in-a-galaxy-far-far-away-part-1|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 1|nolive=1}}</ref>
